getAdminId() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.AdminProfile
Returns the admin document id (typically device id).
getCapacity() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns max accepted entrants; 0 means unlimited.
getCoOrganizerIds() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns co-organizer device ids, never null.
getCurrentEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventRepository
Returns the currently held event.

Reads the currently active event ID from SharedPreferences.
getDescription() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns the event description.
getDeviceId() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry
Returns the entrant device id for this waiting-list document.
getDeviceId(Context) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.DeviceIdManager
Returns the device's unique ID.
getDeviceID() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Returns the device id for this profile.
getDisplayName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Returns optional display name used when first/last name are empty.
getEditLockAcquiredAt() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns when the edit lock was acquired (epoch ms).
getEditLockHeldBy() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns device id holding the edit lock, or null if unlocked.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.AdminProfile
Returns the admin email.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Returns the email, never null.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Returns the email.
getEventDateMillis() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns scheduled event date/time (epoch ms).

getter
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns the event document id.

Returns the Firestore document ID of the event this cluster item represents.
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.InAppNotification
Returns the related event id if any.
getEventname() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary
getter
getEventType() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns event type/category for filters and map tags, never null.

Returns the selected event type filter.
getFirstName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.AdminProfile
Returns the admin first name.
getFirstName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Returns the first name.
getFullName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Returns a display name for the entrant, or a default if missing or blank.
getFullName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Returns a display name: first plus last name if non-blank, else displayName, else "Organizer".

getter

Returns the singleton instance of EventRepository, creating it if necessary.
